polygon.style: stroke-width: 2.56; stroke: none; stroke-linecap: butt; fill: #1A2B3C;

polyline.style: stroke-width: 1.71; stroke: #FFFFFF; stroke-opacity: 0.70; stroke-dasharray: 9.10,9.10; stroke-linecap: butt;

line.style: stroke-width: 1.71; stroke: #FFFFFF; stroke-opacity: 0.70; stroke-dasharray: 9.10,9.10; stroke-linecap: butt;

path.style: fill-rule: nonzero; fill: #FFFFFF; stroke-width: 0.75; stroke: none;
fill-rule: nonzero; fill: #FFFFFF; stroke-width: 0.75; stroke: none;
fill-rule: nonzero; fill: #FFFFFF; stroke-width: 0.75; stroke: none;
fill-rule: nonzero; fill: #FFFFFF; stroke-width: 0.75; stroke: none;
fill-rule: nonzero; fill: #FFFFFF; stroke-width: 0.75; stroke: none;
fill-rule: nonzero; fill: #FFFFFF; stroke-width: 0.75; stroke: none;
fill-rule: nonzero; fill: #FFFFFF; stroke-width: 0.75; stroke: none;
